facts.claim: Utopia of the Seas is totally transforming weekend vacations for good with bigger flavor, bolder play, and better chill days than you’ve ever imagined.
Utopia of the Seas is a cruise ship operated by Royal Caribbean International.
By gross tonnage, she is the third largest cruise ship in the world, larger than sister ship Wonder of the Seas, but surpassed by the Icon-class cruise ships, starting with Icon of the Seas.
